name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 4 Jul 2023
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are very excited to launch our revamped Acquisition Forms. It's simpler and yet better. Find out more, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Revamped Acquisition Forms","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The revamped Acquisition Form feature enables you to create beautifully designed acquisition forms without the complexity of implementation logic. You can also include many additional features to your form without having to code."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Some of the notable enhancements are:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Acquisition Forms are now simpler to create and don’t require you to create a separate builder script."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Acquisition Form builder now comes with templates that you can customize as per your needs. Of course, you can build your Acquisition Form from scratch."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Acquisition Form builder is intuitive and consists of 5 quick steps that include form details, form settings, layout designing, form content, and review. While it seems like a lot, most of the actions/settings are set to a default value and can be edited if you want to customize them. For example, the settings on Form Design (step 3)."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The additional options, while simple to set up, are optional and therefore, provide you with the option of either using them or skipping them altogether. For example, Optional Functions on Form Settings (step 2)."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The form content can be created using the Drag-and-Drop editor which provides powerful features as well as ease of use."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn all about the Acquisition Forms, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Acquisition-Forms","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Acquisition Forms","bold":true}]},{"text":" and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-and-Using-Acquisition-Forms","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating and Using Acquisition Forms","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here's what the template selection looks like:"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Selection.0685g00000FSJRtAAP.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Selection.0685g00000FSJRtAAP.jpg","name":"Selection","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":4082,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"And, here's what step 1 of the Acquisition Form builder looks like:"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Step1.0685g00000FSJS8AAP.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Step1.0685g00000FSJS8AAP.jpg","name":"Step1","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1950,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]}]
